Fell down a hole, spared a skeleton who likes puns, and flirted with a goat mom. Or I could just murder everyone. My choice!
I licked a car, dragged it up a crane, jumped off, and exploded into a ragdoll physics glitch. Masterpiece.
Gathering a diverse team of aliens across the galaxy to stop a terrible threat, but I just want to romance the alien sniper.
I disguised myself as a flamingo mascot so I could casually push my target off a balcony without raising suspicion.
I stamp passports all day while a sad trumpet plays, trying to earn enough money to heat my apartment in a fictional dystopia.
A knitted sack person runs through a world made of cardboard and sponges while narrated by a polite British man.
Became the director of a secret agency, gained telekinesis, and spent my time throwing office chairs at floating people.
Crashed on an ocean planet. Everything is beautiful until you go too deep and hear a roar that triggers your thalassophobia.
I was supposed to follow the narrator's instructions, but I walked through the wrong door and broke reality instead.
Shaking a plastic steering wheel violently while dodging aggressive blue shells and drifting on a rainbow.
Shooting a gun that grows legs and runs around while fighting annoying streamer villains in space.
Four colorful knights beat up an entire kingdom of enemies just to fight each other over who gets to kiss the princess.
Cutting off the limbs of horrifying space mutants with mining tools while wearing an iron suit in zero gravity.
I startled a witch in a dark hospital and my entire team abandoned me to die.
I spent an hour yelling my puppy's name into my DS microphone until my mom asked me who I was talking to.
